response.original_title: Making Space: A Goodbye Love Story
response.overview: Making Space follows Cece, a modern woman who finds herself falling for Jeff, a charming man still untethered from a long-term relationship. When Cece discovers Jeff is dating other people, she’s forced to confront the discomfort of wanting more than someone can give. As honesty replaces assumption, the two navigate intimacy, desire, and letting go, culminating in a bittersweet night of dancing, memory, and acceptance.
response.tagline: Caught in emotional limbo, a woman navigates a “situationship” that challenges her to stop waiting to be chosen and start choosing herself.
response.title: Making Space: A Goodbye Love Story
